'''Miro Daroon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Piton (species)|Piton]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel]] and the tech supervisor of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Daroon was a contemporary of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] during infancy on his homeworld of [[Piton]], Miro Daroon was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. At the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Daroon excelled in technological work, only rivaled by his contemporary [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Xanatos]], who specialized in infrastructure models. Eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] from the academy and being selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to train as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Daroon went onto pass his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="TCT" />

As a Knight, Daroon began independent study on the path to become a [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel]], as it best complemented his skills with technology. After years of hard work, Daroon was given the position of tech supervisor at the Jedi Temple, overseeing the structure's complex [[tech center]] and the distribution of technological equipment to field-duty Jedi. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], Daroon was present at the Temple when a mysterious saboteur caused a continual series of system failures throughout the Temple. As the sabotage grew increasingly worse, Daroon was forced to shut down two wings of the Temple. Working with Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] to combat the intruder, the pair concluded that the only way to undo the attacks was to shut down all of the Temple's systems and restart them—a solution Daroon hesitated to implement, as it would leave the Temple vulnerable.<ref name="TCT" />

When Master Jinn discovered that Initiate [[Bruck Chun]] was aiding the intruder in the sabotage, Daroon helped to lock down the tunnels that the boy was using to move around the Temple complex unseen. After studying the sabotage in detail, Jinn and Daroon came to the conclusion that the saboteur was the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] Xanatos, a former student at the Temple and Jinn's old apprentice. As Jinn hunted Xanatos, Daroon continued his work, shutting down the air circulation system and then the rest of the Temple for a total of twelve minutes. Unknown to the tech supervisor, Xanatos had rigged the Temple's fusion furnace to implode upon a full system's restart, a fact the Dark Jedi gloated about to Master Jinn. Warned of the potential catastrophe, Daroon directed Jinn to the fusion furnace and was able to remove the trigger mechanism before the Temple could be destroyed.<ref name="TCT" />
